title: ScoringProfile
description: Scoring profile for job offer ranking. Defines technology and location preferences used by Sourcing::ScoreStep to score job offers on a 0-100 scale.

technology.description: Technology preferences for scoring job offers.

primary.description: Required technologies. All primary technologies in an offer are required; missing any results in a penalty. Matching primary technologies do not earn additional points (they are baseline).

secondary.description: Nice-to-have technologies. Each match with offer secondary or primary technologies earns +3 points. Subset of offer secondary technologies that match user's secondary list contributes to the score.

location.description: Location and work mode preferences for scoring job offers.

preference.description: Ordered list of preferred work modes, ranked from most to least preferred. Rank 0 is most preferred (100 points), rank 1 deducts 20 points, rank 2 deducts 40 points. Modes not in this list score 0 points.

city.description: Default allowed cities (case-insensitive substring matching). Used for all work modes unless overridden. Required if any work mode depends on location (hybrid or on-site).

hybrid.description: Specific constraints and preferences for hybrid roles.

remote_days_min_per_week.description: Minimum acceptable remote days per week. Offers with fewer remote days score 0. Offers with more remote days deduct (5 - offer_days) * 10 points as a preference penalty.

city.description: Optional: Allowed cities for hybrid offers (case-insensitive substring matching). Overrides location.city if provided. If omitted, falls back to location.city.

on_site.description: Specific constraints and preferences for on-site roles.

city.description: Optional: Allowed cities for on-site offers (case-insensitive substring matching). Overrides location.city if provided. If omitted, falls back to location.city.
